description_long: This object is a rectangular box with bold, vintage-style graphics in red, yellow, and blue. The front and top faces prominently display the words 'SUPER BUCK' in large red letters, with 'PREMIUM HUNTING ROUNDS' in a yellow banner beneath a detailed illustration of a red and gold shotgun shell. The sides of the box feature a repeating pattern of yellow circles, likely representing the ends of shotgun shells, and additional text in smaller fonts. The box has a matte finish and appears to be made of cardboard, typical for packaging ammunition or similar products. The overall design is reminiscent of mid-20th-century packaging, with strong, contrasting colors and clear, blocky typography. There are no visible openings, handles, or interactive parts on the exterior.
description: A rectangular cardboard box with bold red, yellow, and blue graphics, featuring a shotgun shell illustration and vintage-style text.
description_view_0: The front face shows 'SUPER BUCK' in large red letters, a yellow banner, and a detailed shotgun shell illustration.
description_view_1: The side face displays a pattern of yellow circles and smaller text, with the brand name in the upper left corner.
description_view_2: Similar to view 0, this face also features the main 'SUPER BUCK' branding and shotgun shell graphic.
description_view_3: This side mirrors view 1, showing the yellow circle pattern and smaller text, with the brand name in the upper left.
attribute_graphic_design: The label features bold, blocky typography in red and yellow on a blue background, with a detailed illustration of a shotgun shell and a repeating pattern of yellow circles. The design has a vintage, utilitarian style with strong color contrasts and clear, readable text.
